reason: Backend entry point for required project constraints and linked implementation guidelines.
M2 touches module boundaries, routers, services, CRUD wrappers, and provider integration.
Channel storage and session cleanup must stay within the current memory plus JSON model.
Failover and SSE stream errors must use safe, consistent error behavior.
Channel/provider logs must be useful without leaking secrets or prompt bodies.
Implementation must preserve roadmap boundaries and avoid premature frameworks.
M2 spans config, storage, channels, providers, chat, and session cleanup.
